description: Style NoteA brand known world over for its classic styling and impeccable quality standards fcuk definitely delivers the goods with this denim jeans. Its pure cotton composition wicks away sweat lets you stay comfortable in Summer. Pair it with a graphic tee for a day out with friends.Product DetailsBlack jeans with a distressed look on the pockets and at the hemline, buttoned and zipped closure, belt loops around the waist, one loop below the waistband at the back for a low slung belt, two insert pockets in front on the sides with a patch pocket inside the right insert pocket, brand patch at the back on the waistband and two patch pockets at the back with a half patch pocket on the right patch pocketMaterial and Care 100% cottonMachine wash warmWarm ironSize and FitNarrow FitThe model(height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
